case_title: NG, RONNIE vs. CHUN, WAI MING et al

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-10-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON OCT-10-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), NO DISMISSAL FILED AS OF 2PM, 10/10/95. NO APPEARANCE NECESSARY IF DISMISSAL IS FILED BY 11/9/95. HEARING SET FOR NOV-09-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
